title: Deposition of matrix using an M5 TM sprayer for high resolution MALDI analysis
author: Martin Dufresne
materials: Dispose of syringes in biohazard container

steps.title: Remove slides from freezer and place in desiccator for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Remove slides from freezer and place in desiccator for 00:30:00

steps.title: Collect autofluorescence scan using a Zeiss AxioScan Z1
steps.instruction: Collect autofluorescence scan using a Zeiss AxioScan Z1: Pre-IMS Autofluorescence Microscopy

steps.title: Set nitrogen flow to 8 psi
steps.instruction: Set nitrogen flow to 8 psi. turn on TM sprayer.

steps.title: Set nozzle temperature to 60C, and...
steps.instruction: Set nozzle temperature to 60C, and heated stage temperature (if applicable) to 45C.

steps.title: Clean sample loop with 10mL of...
steps.instruction: Clean sample loop with 10mL of methanol with sprayer set to "load". Switch to "spray" and allow to spray for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Make matrix solution at a concentration...
steps.instruction: Make matrix solution at a concentration of 12mg/mL in a solution of 60% THF and 40% acetone containing 5uL/mL DMF. Sonicate solution for 10 minutes. Note that the matrix concentration and solvent composition may vary by sample and matrix.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to "load" and load...
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to "load" and load sample loop with 2 mL of matrix solution using a syringe.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to "spray" and allow...
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to "spray" and allow to spray for ~30 seconds. Check that matrix is spraying by placing a glass slide under the nozzle.

steps.title: Tape slide onto heated stage, and...
steps.instruction: Tape slide onto heated stage, and adjust the spray area in the HTX software.

steps.title: Set the method in the HTX software
steps.instruction: Set the method in the HTX software: 1350 mm/min nozzle velocity 1.5 mm track spacing 0.05 mL/min flow rate CC pattern 4 passes 40 mm nozzle height No drying time

steps.title: Ensure that the method is highlighted
steps.instruction: Ensure that the method is highlighted. Press start under the Cycle tab. Click Continue. Wait for purge delay and confirm that the nozzle is moving

steps.title: When matrix deposition is finished, remove...
steps.instruction: When matrix deposition is finished, remove the slides and store them in a slide box. Press "valve load confirm" in the software.

steps.title: Set TM sprayer nozzle and stage temperatures to 30C
steps.instruction: Set TM sprayer nozzle and stage temperatures to 30C

steps.title: With sprayer set to "load", load...
steps.instruction: With sprayer set to "load", load loop with 10 mL each of acetonitrile followed by methanol. Set sprayer to "spray" and allow to flow for ~5 minutes.

steps.title: Spray nozzle tip with methanol, taking...
steps.instruction: Spray nozzle tip with methanol, taking care not to touch the tip.

steps.title: Clean the stage with methanol
steps.instruction: Clean the stage with methanol. Do not spray solvents directly onto the stage.

steps.title: Replace the bench liner in front of the instruments
steps.instruction: Replace the bench liner in front of the instruments

steps.title: Shut down HTX software and close the computer
steps.instruction: Shut down HTX software and close the computer. Turn off the TM sprayer.
